summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Villa Kephala luxury villa website. All core functionality working correctly including hero section, navigation, photo gallery with tabs, contact form submission, interactive map, and mobile responsiveness.

integration_issues.issue: Success toast notification not visible after form submission, but form clears and backend receives data correctly

passed_tests: Backend API root endpoint responds correctly
Contact form API endpoint accepts valid submissions
Contact form API validation rejects invalid data
Hero section displays with background image and content
Navigation links all present and functional
Photo gallery tabs filter images correctly (All, Bedrooms, Pool, Outdoor)
Contact form fields all present with proper data-testid attributes
Contact form HTML5 validation working for required fields
Contact form successfully submits data to backend
Interactive map iframe loads in Location section
